axes.structural_uniformity: Of 55 HELP tools, only 3 (5.5%) hit >=4/5 elements

deviations.side_effect_risk: 12 tools (RAN_NORMALLY) executed full pipeline despite --help; --help should be pure-output.

minimum_help_set_proposal.rationale: Based on cross-tool comparison, 5-element minimum derived from observed best practice (atlas_shard_scope_lint, hive_parent_sid, openalex_bridge).

elements.name: origin_or_provenance
elements.evidence: Observed in atlas_shard_scope_lint, openalex_bridge — provides traceability

minimum_help_set_proposal.purity_rule: Tools MUST gate on --help/-h flag and exit 0 without side effects (no state writes, no network, no atlas mutation).
